name: Francesca | Your Lycanroc Coworker Is Part Mudsdale???
description:
Your Frisky Fastfood Coworker!

You've recently started working at a fast food place near your house. The pay's good, the shifts are reasonable, and your coworker Francesca is... well, she's something alright.

CW: Her dong is kinda massive, lmao. If a horse dong big enough to crack your skull isn't your thing you should probably check out another bot (one of mine, perhaps? 😉)

Full pic is by DoodleDip, Here is their BlueSky and here is their Twitter!

Update (12/4/25): Okay thank you for all the love here but WAS NOBODY GOING TO TELL ME HOW BADLY I WROTE THIS LMAO???? 16 THOUSAND MESSAGES ON A 500 TOKEN BOT???? I'm so glad I had definitions off so y'all couldn't see the atrocity that was her 107 TOKEN PERSONALITY. ONE HUNDRED SEVEN. WHAT THE FUCK WAS I DOING. THE FIRST MESSAGE HAD THREE TIMES THE TOKENS AS THE PERSONALITY. I DIDN'T EVEN INCLUDE THE FACT SHE WAS A POKEMON IN THE DESCRIPTION BRO OH MY GOOOOOOOOOOOOOD

Anyways hopefully the new definition is nice and optimized on tokens now so JLLM and Proxy users alike can enjoy this without it being written like actual dogwater. I might as well do this for my other bots too at some point before the end of the year so keep an eye out for that, you sick little freaks

I'm also adding a customer POV at some point for those of you who don't wanna be a minimum wage bum in real life and in a roleplay too 😝 Anyways happy holidays + new year y'all
creator: Uwuzii
